win_condition: After the last tile is placed and final scoring is resolved, the player with the highest total points wins.
tiebreaker: If players are tied for highest total points, they share victory.

categories.label: Completed Features
categories.description: Points scored during play for completed roads, cities, and monasteries (including coat of arms bonuses).

categories.label: Incomplete Features (Final)
categories.description: Final scoring for incomplete roads, cities, and monasteries with meeples.

categories.label: Fields (Final)
categories.description: 3 points per completed adjacent city for each scored field.
